ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the provided document:  This document confirms that Kshitij Polyline Limited, through its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent KFin Technologies, has fully complied with SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. This signifies proper management of dematerialized and rematerialized securities, ensuring the integrity of shareholder records and fulfilling a routine regulatory obligation. There are no immediate financial impacts or red flags associated with this standard compliance filing.
